'''Perkles''' were a mammalian [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. 

==History==

One day, the young [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] found a perkle trapped in one of [[Raygar|Dr. Raygar's]] traps. While Teebo was stretching to prepare to lift the device, he accidentally pushed Latara in the way of the mouth of the trap. The foreign device activated, sucking the hapless child into the impervious bubble, trapping her with the perkle. Next, Teebo prepared a magic spell with a dust base. Unfortunately, the dust blew into the trap, but it was able to destroy it from the inside, freeing Latara and the perkle.<ref name="Battle for the Sunstar" />

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Battle for the Sunstar}} {{1st}}
